1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Drammen municipality

2.description: get 200-year flood polygons (gjentaksintervall=200) filtered by category

3.description: inspect distinct bygningsstatus values for buildings in Drammen municipality

4.description: get buildings in Drammen with bygningsstatus = FA and their geometry

5.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood polygons

6.description: deduplicate to one row per building (bygningid)
